Welcome to the Simple Test Page

This is a minimal HTML page used for testing the fetch_url content extraction. It contains a title, a heading, and a few paragraphs of text.

The content extractor should be able to parse this page and extract the main content successfully. This page has no navigation, no sidebars, and no footer — just clean content.

This makes it ideal for testing the basic functionality of the fetch_url tool without any distractions or noise.
